titleStmt.title: SII 30.123: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 123. (A.R. No. 201 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvarā temple-on the north wall Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 8: 1020 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription is much damaged and incomplete. It records gift of paddy to the temple of Śrī Pōnḍai-uḍai[yār] at Parākrama sōḻach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Dāmar-nāḍu, by certain •••• Nārakkaṉ from Kēraḷānthakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya village of Veṇnāḍu of Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanādu in Chōḷa-maṇdalam for performing sacred bath (abishēka) to the deity. It also mentions that the water was to be brought from the well called Śrīvaikuntham of this village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunila maṭantaiyum poṟcayap pāvaiyum cirtanic celviyum ta vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷic cūḻ matiṭ
koḷḷip pākkaiyum naṇṇar*k karumuraṇ maṇṇaik kaṭakkamum porukaṭal Īḻattaraicar tam muṭiyum Āṅkavar tevi ntiraṉāramum teṇṭirai Iḻamaṇ
ṭalam muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭai kkeraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir ceruviṟciṉavil Irupattoru kālaraicukaḷai
kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ meva koṇṭa kopparakecarivanmarāṉa śrīrājentraco
ḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu Aṭṭā ttāmar nāṭṭuk karaikkoṭṭu brahmadeyamāṉa parākkiramacoḻa caturvvetimaṅkalattu śrīpontai yuṭaiya ṇi śrīcoḻamaṇṭalattu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu ve
ṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyam keraḷāntakaccaturvveti maṅkalattu nārakkaṇ ṉ śrī pontai Uṭaiya mahādevarkku
Ivvūr śrīvaikuntameṉṉum taṇṇirk kiṇaṟṟu niṉṟum sandhi kku Irutūṇik kuṟuṇiyum taṇṇiramutukkuk ku
ṟuṇiyumāka sandhināliṉukkum nicatam mukkalane tūṇi kalattu sabhaiyom śrīpontai Ā
ticaṇḍeśvarar kaiyāl yāṅkaḷ koṇṭukaṭava kā la nellukkalamāka Aṟupatiṉ
Digital edition of SII 30.123 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
